title: Fun, Exciting, High-Energy Event & Sales Marketing
description:
Fun, Exciting, High-Energy Event & Sales Marketing job

Event & Sales Marketing Executive

Location: Anywhere Awesome
Employment Type: Full-Time
Vibe: Fast-paced • Creative • People-loving • Results-driven

About the Role

Are you the kind of person who can walk into a room and instantly turn up the energy? Do you love creating memorable moments, connecting with people, and driving sales through unforgettable experiences? If so, this role is the perfect mix of creativity, strategy, and excitement.

As our Event & Sales Marketing Executive, you'll bring our brand to life through dynamic events, compelling marketing campaigns, and smart sales initiatives. You’ll plan, promote, and execute events that get people talking—and turning into loyal customers.

What You’ll Do

💥 Lead and execute exciting events—from pop-up activations and trade shows to product launches and experiential marketing
🎨 Craft creative marketing campaigns that capture attention and drive engagement
🤝 Partner with the sales team to create irresistible promotional strategies that convert curiosity into customers
📣 Grow brand visibility through social media, email marketing, and community outreach
📊 Track event performance and sales results, using data to fine-tune future campaigns
🧠 Brainstorm fresh ideas that push boundaries and elevate the brand experience
🗣️ Represent the brand at events with confidence, enthusiasm, and outstanding customer interactions

What You Bring

✨ A passion for people, experiences, and storytelling
✨ Strong communication and presentation skills
✨ Event planning or marketing experience (bonus if you’ve worked with vendors, venues, or experiential marketing)
✨ Ability to juggle multiple projects with energy and confidence
✨ A creative spark and a drive for measurable results
✨ Willingness to travel and work on-site at events (sometimes evenings/weekends)

Why You’ll Love This Job

🎉 Work on events that are genuinely FUN and make a real impact
🚀 Join a high-energy team that encourages new ideas
💡 Lots of opportunities for professional growth and creativity
🌍 Get out from behind a desk—meet people, build relationships, create experiences
🏆 Be part of a brand that values innovation, teamwork, and bold thinking

postedCompany.description:
✨ About Rezolute Globalz ✨


At Rezolute Globalz, we don’t just do marketing — we create moments, spark conversations, and turn brands into unforgettable experiences. We’re a vibrant team of creators, storytellers, strategists, and event enthusiasts who believe that marketing should feel exciting, bold, and a little bit magical.

From high-energy events to innovative brand activations, we bring ideas to life with style, creativity, and lots of fun. If you love fast-paced environments, big ideas, friendly vibes, and a team that celebrates every win (and laughs through the chaos), you’ll feel right at home with us.

Here, every project is an adventure. Every day is different. And your creativity is your superpower.

Join us and help shape the future of branding — the fun way.
At Rezolute Globalz, we don’t just work. We create. We connect. We turn moments into memories.
postedCompany.name: REZOLUTE GLOBALZ
